title: The Five Elders Descend
description: On pages 6–8, this part focuses on Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Marines, Kuma, Chopper as Luffy’s Gear Fifth form re-enters the battle while the giants arrive, Vegapunk’s broadcast begins, and the Five Elders become the island’s central threat.
scene: Luffy’s Gear Fifth form re-enters the battle while the giants arrive, Vegapunk’s broadcast begins, and the Five Elders become the island’s central threat.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: A large horse was spotted galloping down the coastline!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Attention all troops, this announcement is regarding the fallen Pacificista!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The freezing of their neural circuitry has rendered them temporarily paralyzed.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Some- one on our side did that?

dialogue.speaker: Marines
dialogue.text: That solves the friendly fire problem!

dialogue.speaker: Kuma
dialogue.text: This is our chance! Eliminate Bonney!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The Pacific on this end have all stopped!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's hard to explain what's going on down here, but...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: She was heading to the Northeast shore with the straw hat crew!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Half the Pacific have already been neutralized!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Whoever did it must be an ally!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: A literal monster is flying up there!

summary: This part advances the Nika Returns on Egghead through 29 cleaned dialogue beats, centering the emotional stakes, battle movement, and the wider consequences of Egghead.
